personal.bio: Quality Assurance Engineer and Data Analyst with a background in Applied Mathematics and Informatics. Experienced in data analysis at Stats Perform and specialized in manual testing techniques, API testing with Postman, and database management. Passionate about software quality and user experience.
personal.skills: API Testing, Postman, SQL, Database Management, Trello, Jira, TestRail, HTML/CSS, JMeter, Git, DevTools, Black Box Testing, Opta Core, Researching, Adobe Photoshop, Illustrator
personal.work_experience_text:
Data Analyst @ Stats Perform (2019 – Present, Yerevan):
- Specialized in data analysis and research for sports datasets.
- Used Opta Core for data management and validation.

Credit Specialist @ Converse Bank (2017 – 2019, Yerevan):
- Managed credit applications and client relations.

Sales Manager @ Converse Bank (2016 – 2017).

Back office assistant & Service Specialist @ Inecobank (2016).
personal.education_text:
Bachelor's Degree in Applied Mathematics and Informatics
National Polytechnic University of Armenia (2013 – 2017, Yerevan, Armenia)

Certification Courses:

- Manual QA @ GITC (2023)
- UX/UI @ BDG (2021)
- Adobe Photoshop & Illustrator @ Base Design Studio (2021)
